text:
2chi城 is the 13th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

By taking the on'yomi readings of the numbers, rōmaji, and kanji in "2chi城," the title can be read as "にちじょう," or "日常," meaning "Everyday Life" (lit. "Everyday").
